Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.tests

Class ProofRuleTests

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.tests.ProofRuleTests
public class ProofRuleTests extends Object
Unit tests for Proof Rules and their application Also tests that sequent modification and hypothesis actions behave as expected from an external point of view

      public ProofRuleTests()

  • Method Details

    • cut

      private final IProofRule cut(Predicate pred)
      Generates a cut rule with the given predicate Non-discharging Goal independent.
      Parameters:
      pred - The predicate to first prove, and then assume.
      Returns:
      The resulting cut rule

    • introFreeIdent

      private final IProofRule introFreeIdent(FreeIdentifier freeIdent)
      Generates a rule introducing the given free variable Non-discharging Goal independent.
      Parameters:
      freeIdent - The free identifier to introduce.
      Returns:
      The resulting free identifier introduction rule

    • illFormed

      private static final IProofRule illFormed()
      Generates an ill formed rule. Non-discharging. Goal dependent.

    • selectHyp

      private final IProofRule selectHyp(Predicate pred)
      Generates a hypothesis selection rule with the given predicate Non-discharging Goal independent.
      Parameters:
      pred - The hypothesis predicate to select.
      Returns:
      The resulting selection rule

    • hideHyp

      private final IProofRule hideHyp(Predicate pred)
      Generates a hypothesis hide rule with the given predicate Non-discharging Goal independent.
      Parameters:
      pred - The hypothesis predicate to hide.
      Returns:
      The resulting hide rule

    • fwdInf

      private final IProofRule fwdInf(Predicate pred1, FreeIdentifier freeIdent, Predicate pred2)
      Generates a forward inference rule with the given predicates and free identifier. Non-discharging Goal independent.
      Parameters:
      pred1 - The predicate hypothesis needed for the forward inference.
      freeIdent - The free identifier introduced.
      pred2 - The predicate hypothesis inferred.
      Returns:
      The resulting forward inference rule

      public void testDischargingRuleApplication()
      Tests for rule application for discharging rules

      Tests for forward inference rule application

    • testProofRuleReasoner

      public void testProofRuleReasoner() throws Exception
      Ensure that proof rules constructed with an unregistered reasoner allow retrieving this very reasoner.
      Throws:
      Exception
